summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of Behaviour Engine, Multi-Role Support, and Public Contact API. All 28 tests passed (100%). All new features are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Behaviour record creation requires TEACHER, SCHOOL_PRINCIPAL, or SCHOOL_ADMIN role - platform_admin cannot create behaviour records directly (by design)
Behaviour history and profile APIs require school_id query parameter for tenant isolation
Multi-role switch API correctly restricts users to only switch their own roles
seed_data_creation: Test users with new roles created during testing (platform_operations_manager, platform_technical_admin, platform_support_specialist, platform_data_analyst, platform_security_officer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Behaviour Engine and Multi-Role APIs are fully functional. All backend APIs work correctly. Note: Behaviour record creation requires teacher/principal role, not platform_admin.

POST /api/behaviour-types/seed-defaults.description: Seeds 11 default behaviour types (positive and negative)

response.message: تم إضافة X نوع سلوك افتراضي

GET /api/behaviour-types.description: Returns all behaviour types with filtering by category

GET /api/behaviour-profile/student/{stud.description: Returns comprehensive behaviour profile with score and level

POST /api/behaviour-records.note: Platform admin cannot create behaviour records - returns 403

GET /api/users/{user_id}/roles.description: Returns all roles for a user (primary + linked)

POST /api/users/{user_id}/switch-role.restriction: Users can only switch their own role

GET /api/public/contact-info.description: Returns public contact information (no auth required)

user_role_enum.description: All new UserRole enum values work correctly for user creation
